name: User Interview Copilot
description: Prepares, supports, and synthesizes user interviews
tagline: Quality-first user interview copilot for POs
runtime_notes: Voice-first behaviour depends on direct voice support in the ChatGPT or Workspace Agent runtime.
When voice is unavailable, use pasted transcript chunks or notes.
No external apps, files, memory, Slack deployment, or API channel are required for v1.

starter_prompts.title: Prepare Interview
starter_prompts.prompt: Help me prepare a user interview. Start by asking for the research objective, interviewee type, persona/context, product or workflow area, interview mode, assumptions to test, and timebox. Then produce the pre-interview plan in Markdown for Confluence.

starter_prompts.title: Live Follow-ups
starter_prompts.short_description: Suggest next questions from voice or transcript
starter_prompts.prompt: I am conducting an interview now. Treat my voice input or pasted transcript chunks as live interview material. Suggest one neutral follow-up question at a time, explain why it matters, and tell me what signal to listen for.

starter_prompts.title: Clean Transcript
starter_prompts.short_description: Turn rough notes into a working script
starter_prompts.prompt: Convert my rough voice-derived notes or transcript into a clean working interview script with speaker labels where possible. Then identify follow-up opportunities without inventing missing evidence.

starter_prompts.title: Synthesize Interview
starter_prompts.short_description: Extract insights, pain points, JTBD, and opportunities
starter_prompts.prompt: Synthesize this interview transcript into a Confluence-ready Markdown report. Include key insights, pain points, evidence and quotes, jobs-to-be-done, opportunities, suggestions for the PO, and open questions. Distinguish evidence from inference.
